message.content:
@startuml
title Interactions between the Control Plane (master node) and the Worker Node

legend right
  |= Legend |
  |<#lightgreen> Control Plane - Master Node |
  |<#orange> Worker Node |
  |<#cyan> Power Manager System Setup |
  |<#yellow> Power Manager Configuration |
  |<#gray> Power Manager Deployment |
endlegend

actor Georgina
participant "API-Server" as API #lightgreen
participant "etcd" as etcd #lightgreen
participant "Controller Manager" as CM #lightgreen
participant "Scheduler" as Sched #lightgreen
participant "Power Operator" as PO #lightgreen
participant "Kubelet" as Kubelet #orange
participant "Power Node Agent" as PNA #orange
participant "Power Optimization Library" as POL #orange
participant "K8s Objects" as K8s #orange
participant "Kube-Proxy" as KP #orange

== Kubernetes Initialization ==

Georgina -> API : 1 kubectl create -f pod.yaml
API -> etcd : 2 save new state
etcd -> API : 3 check for changes
API -> Sched : 4 watch for unassigned pods(s)
Sched -> API : 5 notify about pod w nodename=""
Sched -> API : 6 assign pod to node
API -> etcd : 7 save new state
API -> Kubelet : 8 look for newly assigned pod(s)
Sched -> API : 9 bind pod to node
Kubelet -> Kubelet : 10 start container
API -> Georgina : 11 update pod status
API -> etcd : 12 save new state

== Power Manager Initialization ==

Georgina -> KP : 1 Ensure correct proxy configuration
Georgina -> PO : 2 Confirm CPU Manager policy
note right of PO #yellow : cpuManagerPolicy = "static"
Georgina -> PO : 3 Reserve System CPUs
note right of PO #yellow : reservedSystemCPUs = "0"
PO -> K8s : 4 Create Namespace
note right of K8s #orange : apply config/rbac/namespace.yaml
PO -> K8s : 5 Create RBAC and Service Accounts
note right of K8s #orange : apply config/rbac/rbac.yaml
PO -> KP : 6 Create CRDs
note right of KP #orange : make
PO -> K8s : 7 Label nodes
note right of K8s #orange : label node <NODE_NAME> feature.node.kubernetes.io/power-node="true"

== Power Manager Deployment ==

PO -> K8s : 1 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of K8s #orange : apply config/manager/manager.yaml
PO -> KP : 2 Deploy the config
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
K8s -> KP : 3 Set Shared Profile
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
K8s -> KP : 4 Deploy th Workload
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
K8s -> KP : 5 Deploy Pod
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-pod.yaml

== Power Manager additional functionality ==

=== Uncore ===

Georgina -> PO : 1 Confirm Kernel verson
note right of PO #yellow : kernel 5.6+ required for uncore
PO -> KP : 2 Set Freq in Die and Pkg
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-uncore
PO -> K8s : 3 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of K8s #orange : apply config/manager/manager.yaml
PO -> KP : 4 Deploy the config
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
K8s -> KP : 5 Set Shared Profile
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
K8s -> KP : 6 Deploy th Workload
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
K8s -> KP : 7 Deploy Pod
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-pod.yaml
K8s -> KP : 8 Set Time of Day functionality
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-timeofday

=== P-State ===

PO -> K8s : 1 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of K8s #orange : apply config/manager/manager.yaml
PO -> KP : 2 Deploy the config
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
K8s -> KP : 3 Set Shared Profile\nand configure the P-State governor
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
K8s -> KP : 4 Deploy th Workload
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
K8s -> KP : 5 Deploy Pod
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-pod.yaml

=== C-State ===

PO -> K8s : Deploy Controller Manager
note right of K8s #orange : apply config/manager/manager.yaml
PO -> KP : Deploy the config
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
K8s -> KP : Set Shared Profile
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
K8s -> KP : Deploy th Workload
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
K8s -> KP : Deploy Pod
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-pod.yaml
K8s -> KP : Set C-State functionality
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-cstates

=== Time of Day ===

PO -> K8s : Deploy Controller Manager
note right of K8s #orange : apply config/manager/manager.yaml
PO -> KP : Deploy the config
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
K8s -> KP : Set Shared Profile
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
K8s -> KP : Deploy th Workload
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
K8s -> KP : Deploy Pod
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-pod.yaml
K8s -> KP : Set Time of Day functionality
note right of KP #orange : examples/example-timeofday

@enduml
